sp_widget.name: tracenow_privacy_policy
sp_widget.template:
Privacy Policy

Your privacy matters to us. Learn how we collect, use, protect, and manage your information.

SOC 2 Certified

Independently audited security

AES-256 Encryption

Military-grade protection

GDPR Compliant

Full regulatory compliance

Secure Infrastructure

Enterprise-grade hosting

Table of Contents

  • Introduction
  • Information We Collect
  • How We Use Information
  • Cookies & Tracking
  • Data Security
  • Third-Party Services
  • User Rights
  • Data Retention
  • Contact Us

Need Help?

Contact our privacy team for any questions

Introduction

Welcome to our Privacy Policy. At TraceNow, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our data migration platform and services.

We understand that privacy is important to you, and we strive to be transparent about our data practices. This policy applies to all users of our platform, including enterprise customers, individual users, and visitors to our website.

Important: By using our services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our services.

Information We Collect

Personal Information

We collect personal information that you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, company name, job title, phone number, and billing information when you create an account or purchase our services.

Migration Data

When you use our data migration services, we process the data you choose to migrate, including ServiceNow records, metadata, attachments, and configuration settings.

Account Data
Migration Data

How We Use Information

We use the information we collect for various purposes, including:

  • Providing, maintaining, and improving our data migration services
  • Processing your transactions and managing your account
  • Sending you technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages
  • Responding to your comments, questions, and customer service requests
  • Monitoring and analyzing usage patterns and trends to improve user experience
  • Detecting, preventing, and addressing technical issues and security vulnerabilities
  • Complying with legal obligations and enforcing our terms of service

sys_update_version.name: sp_widget_502984b293914f500af5f4e9b903d6f2
sys_update_version.payload: customc.pp-page { font-family: Inter, "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif; background: #f5f7fc; overflow-x: hidden; } /* CONTAINER */ .container { width: 100%; max-width: 1180px; margin: auto; padding: 0 32px; } /* HERO */ .pp-hero { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient( 90deg, #116AF8 0%, #0A50F5 100% ); padding: 70px 0 120px; border-radius: 0 0 32px 32px; } /* GRID */ .pp-grid { position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: .12; background-image: linear-gradient( rgba(255,255,255,.5) 1px, transparent 1px ), linear-gradient( 90deg, rgba(255,255,255,.5) 1px, transparent 1px ); background-size: 78px 78px; } /* FLOATING CIRCLE */ .pp-circle { position: absolute; left: 80px; top: 340px; width: 150px; height: 150px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); } /* HERO LAYOUT */ .pp-hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 10; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 60px; } /* LEFT */ .pp-left { max-width: 620px; padding: 10px 18px; } .pp-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 5px 10px; } .pp-badge:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.01); } .pp-left h1 { color: white; font-size: 64px; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.05; margin: 28px 0 20px; } .pp-left p { color: rgba(255,255,255,.9); font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.8; max-width: 520px; } /* BUTTONS */ .pp-actions { margin-top: 32px; display: flex; gap: 16px; } .btn-primary, .btn-secondary { height: 52px; padding: 0 26px; border-radius: 14px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all .25s ease; } .btn-primary { background: white; border: none; color: #116AF8; } .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); } .btn-secondary { background: rgba(255,255,255,.08); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25); color: white; } .btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); } /* RIGHT */ .pp-right { position: relative; } .security-card { width: 310px; height: 310px; border-radius: 28px; background: linear-gradient( 180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.18), rgba(255,255,255,.08) ); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; backdrop-filter: blur(20px); } /* DECORATIVE OUTLINE CARD */ .security-card:before { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 150px; height: 150px; top: -35px; right: -20px; border-radius: 24px; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); transform: rotate(10deg); } /* FLOATING ICONS */ .floating-lock, .floating-check { position: absolute; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.15); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-size: 18px; } .floating-lock { top: -12px; right: -12px; animation: lockFloat 4s ease-in-out infinite; } .floating-check { left: -12px; bottom: 38px; animation: checkFloat 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes lockFloat { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); } 50% { transform: translateY(-15px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } } @keyframes checkFloat { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); } 50% { transform: translateY(12px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } } /* HERO CURVE */ .hero-curve { position: absolute; bottom: -1px; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 80px; background: #f5f7fc; clip-path: polygon( 0 55%, 20% 20%, 50% 0, 80% 20%, 100% 55%, 100% 100%, 0 100% ); } /* FEATURES */ .pp-features { position: relative; z-index: 20; margin-top: -60px; } .feature-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 28px; } .feature-card { background: white; border-radius: 20px; padding: 26px; min-height: 170px; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.08); transition: transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease; cursor: pointer; } .feature-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 25px 60px rgba(17,106,248,.15); } .feature-card:hover .icon-box { transform: scale(1.08); } .icon-box { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 14px; background: linear-gradient( 180deg, #116AF8, #0A50F5 ); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-size: 18px; transition: transform .3s ease; } .feature-card h3 { margin-top: 18px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #101828; } .feature-card p { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: #667085; } /* RESPONSIVE */ @media (max-width: 1200px) { .pp-hero-content { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; } .pp-left { max-width: 100%; } .pp-left p { margin: 0 auto; } .pp-actions { justify-content: center; } .feature-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .pp-left h1 { font-size: 54px; } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .container { padding: 0 20px; } .pp-hero { padding: 60px 0 110px; } .pp-left h1 { font-size: 42px; } .pp-left p { font-size: 16px; } .security-card { width: 260px; height: 260px; } .pp-actions { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .btn-primary, .btn-secondary { width: 100%; max-width: 260px; } .feature-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .pp-features { margin-top: -40px; } } /* ========================== CONTENT AREA ========================== */ .pp-content-section { padding: 50px 0 80px; } .pp-layout { display: flex; gap: 40px; align-items: flex-start; } /* ========================== SIDEBAR ========================== */ .pp-sidebar { width: 280px; flex: 0 0 280px; } .toc-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 18px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, .08); position: sticky; top: 30px; } .toc-card h3 { margin: 0 0 20px; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; } .toc-card h3 i { margin-right: 10px; color: #116AF8; } .toc-card ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .toc-card li { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 14px; border-radius: 12px; color: #475569; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all .3s ease; } .toc-card li:hover { background: #f3f7ff; color: #116AF8; } .toc-card li.active { background: linear-gradient( 90deg, #116AF8, #0A50F5 ); color: white; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(17,106,248,.25); } .help-box { margin-top: 24px; background: #eef4ff; border: 1px solid #d8e5ff; border-radius: 16px; padding: 18px; } .help-box h4 { margin: 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; } .help-box p { margin: 8px 0 16px; font-size: 13px; color: #64748b; } .help-box button { width: 100%; height: 42px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; background: linear-gradient( 90deg, #116AF8, #0A50F5 ); color: white; font-weight: 600; } /* ========================== MAIN CONTENT ========================== */ .pp-main-content { flex: 1; min-width:0; } /* ========================== POLICY CARD ========================== */ .policy-card { background: white; border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 28px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,.08); } .policy-header { background: linear-gradient( 90deg, #116AF8, #0A50F5 ); padding: 18px 26px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; } .policy-icon { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,.15); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; } .policy-header h2 { margin: 0; color: white; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; } .policy-body { padding: 28px; } .policy-body p { color: #334155; line-height: 1.9; font-size: 16px; } /* IMPORTANT BOX */ .important-box { margin-top: 25px; background: #f2f7ff; border-left: 4px solid #116AF8; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 12px; color: #334155; } /* SUBSECTIONS */ .policy-subsection { margin-bottom: 35px; } .policy-subsection h3 { position: relative; margin-bottom: 14px; padding-left: 16px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; } .policy-subsection h3:before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 2px; width: 5px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50px; background: #116AF8; } /* RESPONSIVE */ @media (max-width: 992px) { .pp-layout { flex-direction: column; } .pp-sidebar { width: 100%; } .toc-card { position: relative; top: auto; } } /* MINI INFO CARDS */ .info-mini-grid { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 20px; padding-bottom:10px; } .info-mini-card { flex: 1; min-height: 66px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbe4f0; background: #f8fafc; padding: 14px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; transition: all .25s ease; } .info-mini-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(17,106,248,.08); } .mini-icon { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .account-icon { background: linear-gradient( 135deg, #4F46E5, #3B82F6 ); } .migration-icon { background: linear-gradient( 135deg, #EC4899, #A855F7 ); } .info-mini-card span { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; } .section-intro { margin-bottom: 28px; color: #475569; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7; } .usage-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .usage-list li { position: relative; padding-left: 28px; margin-bottom: 28px; color: #334155; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; } .usage-list li:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } .usage-list li:before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 7px; width: 14px; height: 14px; border: 2px solid #116AF8; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; } .usage-list li:after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 5px; top: 12px; width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 50%; background: #116AF8; }sp_instancetruefalsetracenow_privacy_policyfalsefalsesp_widgetmunaib.ashraf2026-06-09 06:14:27502984b293914f500af5f4e9b903d6f234tracenow_privacy_policy7307d82a3bc847103509f3cc73e45aeb7307d82a3bc847103509f3cc73e45aebsp_widget_502984b293914f500af5f4e9b903d6f2munaib.ashraf2026-06-09 17:14:50
